name: agent-advantage-native-public-360
purpose: Front-end GVIM/DeerFlow chemistry/materials evaluation using published public benchmark tasks only. The former local custom scoring layer has been removed.

ChemBench-Mini.paper_or_source: ChemBench, Nature Chemistry / official ChemBench benchmark
ChemBench-Mini.native_scoring_rule: official ChemBench package/parser/metrics only; no local custom parser

MaScQA.paper_or_source: MaScQA materials science QA benchmark, Digital Discovery 2024, DOI: 10.1039/D3DD00188A
MaScQA.native_scoring_rule: published answer-key accuracy for MCQS/MATCH/MCQS-NUM/NUM; deterministic parser fixed before evaluation

ChemLLMBench.paper_or_source: ChemLLMBench, NeurIPS 2023 Datasets and Benchmarks Track
ChemLLMBench.native_scoring_rule: task-specific answer-key metrics following official task definitions

selection_policy.high_level_counts: 236 ChemBench-Mini + 84 MaScQA + 40 ChemLLMBench = 360 published benchmark tasks
selection_policy.removed: The previous 40 local custom workflow tasks and scoring rubric were deleted and are not part of this queue.
selection_policy.scoring_policy: Report each source benchmark separately using its native published scoring rule. Do not compute a new weighted aggregate unless a source benchmark itself defines it.

submission_policy.entrypoint: front-end browser automation through logged-in GVIM/DeerFlow UI
submission_policy.conversation_policy: Use fresh conversations or a pre-registered bounded batch size. Keep the native-published-40 run separate from earlier local-custom runs.
